headline: Northside Kings: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Northside Kings is projected #15 of 16 with a 491.50 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by Bhayshul Tuten, Mike Evans, and RJ Harvey. The immediate priority is improving the QB slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 15, Northside Kings traded with Ravens Regime and acquired RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (Rapid Valley Annihilation) while sending Tyler Warren. RJ Harvey is now the current RB starter at 62.3 C-AVI and 75.2 D-AVI; Bhayshul Tuten is now the current RB starter at 72.9 C-AVI and 78.7 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the QB slot above Jordan Love's 52.4 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 84.5 C-AVI would directly attack the 32.10-point projected gap to Crimson Tide Pods.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On October 28, Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 traded with Murray had a little Lamb and acquired Kayshon Boutte while sending 2026 Round 3 (Conquistadors), 2027 Round 2 (Conquistadors). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

rival_below.summary: On October 28, Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 traded with Murray had a little Lamb and acquired Kayshon Boutte while sending 2026 Round 3 (Conquistadors), 2027 Round 2 (Conquistadors). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #15 of 16 at 491.50 lineup C-AVI. Crimson Tide Pods is immediately above at 523.60, a gap of 32.10. Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 is immediately behind at 487.10.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Bhayshul Tuten (72.9), Mike Evans (70.8), and RJ Harvey (62.3).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 15, Northside Kings traded with Ravens Regime and acquired RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (Rapid Valley Annihilation) while sending Tyler Warren. RJ Harvey is now the current RB starter at 62.3 C-AVI and 75.2 D-AVI; Bhayshul Tuten is now the current RB starter at 72.9 C-AVI and 78.7 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the QB slot above Jordan Love's 52.4 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 84.5 C-AVI would directly attack the 32.10-point projected gap to Crimson Tide Pods. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Rival Watch
sections.body: On October 28, Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 traded with Murray had a little Lamb and acquired Kayshon Boutte while sending 2026 Round 3 (Conquistadors), 2027 Round 2 (Conquistadors). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jordan Love is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 52.4. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 15 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
